Uses of Package
common

  • Packages that use common 
    Package Description
    batch
    Provides the core orchestration logic for batch-processing media metadata.
    common
    Contains shared foundational utilities for byte-level data handling and low-level operations.
    heif
    Provides high-level classes for parsing and manipulating HEIF-based files.
    jpg
    Classes for parsing and manipulating JPEG-based files are found here.
    png
    Functionality for parsing and processing PNG image files is provided here.
    tif
    Classes for parsing and manipulating TIFF-based files.
    webp  
    xmp  
  • Classes in common used by batch 
    Class Description
    DigitalSignature
    Enumerates known media formats by identifying their distinct magic numbers in the media file header.
    Metadata
    Represents a collection of image metadata organised into Directory instances.
  • Classes in common used by common 
    Class Description
    AbstractImageParser
    An abstract base for image file parsers.
    DigitalSignature
    Enumerates known media formats by identifying their distinct magic numbers in the media file header.
    Directory
    Represents a generic collection or directory of entries of a specific type.
    Metadata
    Represents a collection of image metadata organised into Directory instances.
  • Classes in common used by heif 
    Class Description
    AbstractImageParser
    An abstract base for image file parsers.
    DigitalSignature
    Enumerates known media formats by identifying their distinct magic numbers in the media file header.
    ImageHandler
    Defines the contract for a handler that processes image files and extracts structured metadata.
  • Classes in common used by jpg 
    Class Description
    AbstractImageParser
    An abstract base for image file parsers.
    DigitalSignature
    Enumerates known media formats by identifying their distinct magic numbers in the media file header.
  • Classes in common used by png 
    Class Description
    AbstractImageParser
    An abstract base for image file parsers.
    DigitalSignature
    Enumerates known media formats by identifying their distinct magic numbers in the media file header.
    Directory
    Represents a generic collection or directory of entries of a specific type.
    ImageHandler
    Defines the contract for a handler that processes image files and extracts structured metadata.
    Metadata
    Represents a collection of image metadata organised into Directory instances.

    Class Description
    AbstractImageParser
    An abstract base for image file parsers.
    DigitalSignature
    Enumerates known media formats by identifying their distinct magic numbers in the media file header.
    Directory
    Represents a generic collection or directory of entries of a specific type.
    ImageHandler
    Defines the contract for a handler that processes image files and extracts structured metadata.
    Metadata
    Represents a collection of image metadata organised into Directory instances.

    Class Description
    AbstractImageParser
    An abstract base for image file parsers.
    DigitalSignature
    Enumerates known media formats by identifying their distinct magic numbers in the media file header.
    ImageHandler

  • Classes in common used by xmp 
    Class Description
    Directory
    Represents a generic collection or directory of entries of a specific type.
    ImageHandler
